entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The crop species being genetically characterized using a global collection of inbred lines.

entities.name: ILLUMINA GOLDENGATE ASSAY
entities.description: A genotyping method using 1536 SNPs from 582 loci to analyze maize diversity.

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as genetic markers to estimate diversity and population structure.

entities.name: LOCI
entities.description: Specific genomic positions used to identify informative SNPs and haplotypes.

entities.name: INBRED LINES
entities.description: Pure-breeding maize lines from temperate, tropical, and subtropical breeding programs.

entities.name: TEMPERATE
entities.description: Geographic region or breeding program associated with temperate climates.

entities.name: TROPICAL
entities.description: Geographic region or breeding program associated with tropical climates.

entities.name: SUBTROPICAL
entities.description: Geographic region or breeding program associated with subtropical climates.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The overall genetic variation within the global maize collection.

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The organization of the maize collection into subgroups based on genetic similarity.

entities.name: FAMILIAL RELATEDNESS
entities.description: The degree of genetic kinship among the inbred lines in the collection.

entities.name: LINKAGE DISEQUILIBRIUM
entities.description: The non-random association of alleles at different loci, measured overall and within chromosomes.

entities.name: LD DECAY DISTANCE
entities.description: The distance over which linkage disequilibrium decreases, varying by chromosome and region.

entities.name: MINOR ALLELIC FREQUENCY
entities.description: The frequency of the less common allele, which influences the LD decay distance.

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of allele combinations across loci used to define a core set of inbreds.

entities.name: CORE SET
entities.description: A representative subset of 60 inbred lines capturing 90% of the haplotype diversity.
